name: Anna M.
text: Kukaa kwenye computer muda mrefu kuliniletea macho kuchoka na headache. Nilipata msaada hapa na sasa hali ni nzuri sana.

name: Brian K.
text: I spend long hours on my laptop, nilikuwa na eye strain na blurred vision. After my visit, I got proper guidance and glasses. Big difference honestly.

name: Jane S.
text: Macho yangu yalikuwa yanawasha na kuuma mara kwa mara. Nilipata huduma nzuri na ushauri pia. I feel much better now.

name: Mama Neema
text: Nina kisukari na nilikuwa naona ukungu mara kwa mara. Nilipata ushauri mzuri sana kuhusu macho na afya yangu. Huduma ni ya kujali sana.

name: Salum H.
text: Kuendesha usiku ilikuwa changamoto, taa zinaniumiza macho. Baada ya kupata miwani hapa, sasa naendesha bila stress.

name: Neema L.
text: Bibi yangu alikuwa amefanyiwa upasuaji wa mtoto wa jicho lakini hakuona vizuri bado. Tulipokuja hapa wakampima vizuri na kumpa miwani sahihi, sasa anaona na ana furaha sana.

name: Pendaeli S.
text: Kazi yangu ni boda boda, nilikuwa naona ukungu hasa usiku na taa za magari zinanisumbua sana. Baada ya kupimwa hapa nikapata miwani sahihi, sasa naendesha vizuri bila shida. Huduma ni top.

name: David P.
text: My eyes were very dry kutokana na kutumia simu sana. Walinipa advice na treatment, now I'm much more comfortable. Good care and very friendly.

name: Evalyn N.
text: Hii si kliniki ya kawaida tu, wanajali afya yako kwa ujumla. Nilipenda ushauri kuhusu mtindo wa maisha na afya ya macho.

name: Glory
text: Very welcoming place, unafeel kama uko sehemu sahihi.

name: Kelvin S.
text: I had constant headaches especially jioni, but I didn't know it was eye related. After check-up and glasses, headaches zimepungua sana. Very professional service.

name: Rosemary M.
text: Nilikuwa na macho kuwasha na kuwa mekundu almost every day, nilidhani ni kawaida. After kwenda Tee Optometry Clinic, nilipata treatment na sasa niko sawa kabisa. Huduma ni nzuri sana!

name: Olivia R.
text: Wanajali sana comfort ya mgonjwa, sio haraka haraka tu.

name: Christian W.
text: Very professional service with minimal waiting time. The process was smooth, and I got the appropriate reading glasses I needed without stress. I will definitely come back.

name: Sylia
text: What I loved most is how the doctor takes time to educate you about your eyes. I learned so much about eye care and prevention.

name: Brenda
text: Nilimpeleka mtoto wangu kwa uchunguzi wa macho, na huduma ilikuwa nzuri sana. Daktari alikuwa mpole na mwenye subira, mtoto alijisikia salama.

name: Happy Phillips
text: Honestly one of the best clinics I've visited hapa town.

name: Wema
text: Nilikuwa na shida ya kuona mbali, now I can see clearly kabisa.

name: Diana
text: I couldn't read for long bila macho kuchoka. After check-up, nilipewa solution simple but effective. Now I can study vizuri.

name: Mbonea
text: I had blurred vision and eye strain, especially jioni, but now I'm okay kabisa.

name: Ayo
text: Fast service, hakuna usumbufu. Nilikuwa na headache na macho kuchoka sana, but now niko poa after kupata miwani. Highly recommend.

name: Esther P.
text: Nilikuwa na shida ya kuona mbali na karibu pia. Baada ya kupimwa vizuri, everything was explained clearly. Sasa naona vizuri sana.

name: Ibra
text: Kazi yangu inahitaji kuona vizuri kila siku, hivyo sikuwa na muda wa kusubiri. Nilisaidiwa haraka na ndani ya masaa 24 nikapata miwani. Huduma ni ya haraka sana na ya uhakika, nimeridhika kabisa.
